agents_status_check.name: agents_status_check
agents_status_check.value: (status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['idle'::character varying, 'working'::character varying, 'paused'::character varying, 'error'::character varying, 'offline'::character varying])::text[])

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.default: 'Review pending tasks and take appropriate actions.'

integration_connections_status_check.name: integration_connections_status_check
integration_connections_status_check.value: (status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'active'::character varying, 'expired'::character varying, 'error'::character varying, 'revoked'::character varying])::text[])

integration_definitions_auth_type_check.name: integration_definitions_auth_type_check
integration_definitions_auth_type_check.value: (auth_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['api_key'::character varying, 'oauth2'::character varying, 'webhook'::character varying, 'basic'::character varying, 'none'::character varying])::text[])

system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.default: 'You are a project coordinator. Review the current state of tasks and boards, then suggest and execute actions to move work forward.'
